flashcards.definition: A bell-shaped, symmetric distribution defined by mean μ and standard deviation σ.
68% of data within 1σ, 95% within 2σ, 99.7% within 3σ of the mean.
A normal distribution with μ = 0 and σ = 1; z-scores follow this distribution.
Z = (X − μ)/σ; standardizes any normal value to the standard normal scale.
A table providing the cumulative area (probability) to the left of a given z-score.
